description: Mr. Zhang's sofa set arrives. The team delivers, assembles, and checks everything together.
visual_style: See style-guide.md for full consistency rules

scenes.description: Li Wei and the delivery team arrive at Mr. Zhang's apartment.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Good morning, Mr. Zhang. We're here with your sofa set.
lines.zh: 早上好，张先生。我们把您的沙发套装送来了。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Great, please come in. The elevator is just around the corner.
lines.zh: 太好了，请进。电梯就在拐角处。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Thank you. We'll be careful with the walls and floor.
lines.zh: 谢谢。我们会小心墙面和地板的。

scenes.description: The team prepares the sofa in the living room.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.en: Where would you like the sofa, sir?
lines.zh: 先生，您希望把沙发放在哪里？

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Against that wall, facing the window.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.en: Understood. We'll remove the packaging first.
lines.zh: 明白了。我们先拆掉包装。

scenes.description: The delivery team connects the sofa parts.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.en: The sofa comes in two parts. We need to connect them.
lines.zh: 这款沙发分两部分。我们需要把它们连接起来。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: How long does the assembly take?

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.en: About fifteen minutes. The tools are in our van.
lines.zh: 大约十五分钟。工具在我们的货车里。

scenes.description: Li Wei confirms the sofa placement with Mr. Zhang.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Is this placement okay, Mr. Zhang?
lines.zh: 张先生，这样摆放可以吗？

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Could you move it a little to the left?

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Of course. Let me adjust it now.
lines.zh: 当然可以。我现在调整一下。

scenes.description: Mr. Zhang checks the sofa condition carefully.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: I don't see any scratches. The fabric looks perfect.
lines.zh: 我没看到划痕。面料看起来很完美。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: We checked everything before leaving the showroom.
lines.zh: 我们离开展厅前已经检查过所有东西了。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Excellent. I'm very happy with it.

scenes.description: Mr. Zhang signs the delivery confirmation.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Please sign here to confirm delivery and installation.
lines.zh: 请在这里签字确认送货和安装。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Sure. Thank you for your careful work.
lines.zh: 好的。谢谢你们细心的工作。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: You're welcome. Enjoy your new sofa!
lines.zh: 不客气。祝您享受新沙发！
